name: linear-chain-concurrent-writes
description: N concurrent write-primitive requests against one context_id through one daemon instance yield a linear chain: zero forks, the first record anchored at the genesis chain_root, every later record chaining to its immediate predecessor. This pins the genesis-race fix motivated by the 2026-07-10 chain-fork measurement (1,001 forks, 517 within five seconds, no locking on read-tail, sign, append).
